# Local Transcript

> Free, open-source macOS app that transcribes audio, video, URLs, and live microphone recordings entirely on-device. It runs OpenAI's Whisper large-v3 model via whisper.cpp with Apple Metal GPU acceleration, so audio never leaves the Mac. Built for Cantonese and Chinese; also supports English, Mandarin, Japanese, Korean, French, Spanish, and auto-detect. Apple Silicon (M1+), macOS 11+. No account, no subscription, no telemetry.

## Key facts
- Platform: macOS 11+ on Apple Silicon (M1 or later). Intel Macs not supported.
- Price: free and open-source. No account or subscription.
- Privacy: 100% on-device transcription. Only network request is a one-time 2.9 GB model download from Hugging Face.
- Engine: whisper.cpp + Whisper large-v3, Apple Metal GPU acceleration.
- Sources: audio/video file, media URL, live microphone recording.
- Output formats: Markdown, SRT, VTT, CSV, JSON, plain text.
- Distribution: ad-hoc signed (not notarized); approve once via System Settings → Privacy & Security → Open Anyway.

## Links
- [Download (latest release)](https://github.com/gordonsph/Local-Transcript/releases/latest): the macOS .dmg.
- [README](https://github.com/gordonsph/Local-Transcript/blob/main/README.md): overview, features, comparison, and FAQ.
- [Install guide](https://github.com/gordonsph/Local-Transcript/blob/main/docs/INSTALL.md): step-by-step install and first-run model download.
- [whisper.cpp](https://github.com/ggml-org/whisper.cpp): the underlying inference engine.
